summary.en: Mozambique does not run an EU-style RoHS regime for power tools, so there is no standalone restricted-substance mark equivalent to the EU declaration. Material safety is addressed through general product-safety expectations, adopted NM/IEC construction requirements, and any chemical or environmental import controls. Importers should still hold supplier material information so that local authorities or buyers can be satisfied on hazardous-substance content.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克并未对电动工具实行欧盟式 RoHS 制度，因此不存在等同于欧盟声明的独立限用物质标识。材料安全通过一般产品安全要求、采纳的 NM/IEC 结构要求以及任何化学或环境进口管制处理。进口商仍应持有供应商材料信息，以便当地主管部门或买家就有害物质含量获得保证。
summary.zht: 莫三比克並未對電動工具實行歐盟式 RoHS 制度，因此不存在等同於歐盟聲明的獨立限用物質標識。材料安全通過一般產品安全要求、採納的 NM/IEC 結構要求以及任何化學或環境進口管制處理。進口商仍應持有供應商材料資訊，以便當地主管部門或買家就有害物質含量獲得保證。

standards_or_laws: Adopted NM/IEC 62841 construction and material safety clauses
Mozambique general product-safety and chemical/environmental import controls where applicable
Supplier material declarations retained for due diligence [no EU-style RoHS mark required]

summary.en: China power-tool files commonly rely on the GB/T 3883 series for construction and material safety and may carry China RoHS-style material declarations. These can support buyer or authority queries but are not tied to an EU-style restricted-substance mark, which Mozambique does not impose on power tools.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具文件通常依赖 GB/T 3883 系列处理结构和材料安全，并可能附带中国 RoHS 式材料声明。这些可支持买家或主管部门查询，但不与欧盟式限用物质标识挂钩，而莫桑比克对电动工具不施加此类标识。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具文件通常依賴 GB/T 3883 系列處理結構和材料安全，並可能附帶中國 RoHS 式材料聲明。這些可支援買家或主管部門查詢，但不與歐盟式限用物質標識掛鉤，而莫三比克對電動工具不施加此類標識。

standards_or_laws: China RoHS-style material declarations where applicable

gap.en: The honest position is that there is no mandatory Mozambique RoHS mark to satisfy. The realistic gap is keeping supplier material-traceability evidence on file so the importer can answer hazardous-substance and environmental import questions, rather than assuming an EU RoHS declaration is required or, conversely, that no material information is needed at all.
gap.zh: 如实而言，不存在需要满足的强制莫桑比克 RoHS 标识。现实差距在于保留供应商材料追溯证据，使进口商能回答有害物质和环境进口问询，而不应假定需要欧盟 RoHS 声明，或反过来认为完全不需要材料信息。
gap.zht: 如實而言，不存在需要滿足的強制莫三比克 RoHS 標識。現實差距在於保留供應商材料追溯證據，使進口商能回答有害物質和環境進口問詢，而不應假定需要歐盟 RoHS 聲明，或反過來認為完全不需要材料資訊。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style RoHS product mark is mandatory in Mozambique for power tools; hazardous-substance control is handled through general product-safety expectations and any applicable chemical/environmental import controls.
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T 3883 and China RoHS-style declarations support material review but are not a Mozambique restricted-substance mark.

source.publisher: INNOQ - Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade （Mozambique）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No EU-style RoHS non-compliance applies because Mozambique imposes no such mark on power tools. Handle substances honestly: retain supplier material-traceability evidence to answer hazardous-substance and environmental import questions, without claiming a nonexistent RoHS obligation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不适用欧盟式 RoHS 不合规，因为莫桑比克对电动工具不施加此类标识。应如实处理物质问题：保留供应商材料追溯证据以回答有害物质和环境进口问询，而不主张并不存在的 RoHS 义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不適用歐盟式 RoHS 不合規，因為莫三比克對電動工具不施加此類標識。應如實處理物質問題：保留供應商材料追溯證據以回答有害物質和環境進口問詢，而不主張並不存在的 RoHS 義務。

requirement_topic.en: Cordless Battery Tools and INCM Radio Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 无绳电池工具与 INCM 无线电批准
requirement_topic.zht: 無繩電池工具與 INCM 無線電批准

summary.en: For cordless power tools, two Mozambique-specific points arise. First, lithium battery packs need safety evidence and safe transport handling, assessed inside the INNOQ conformity and import-inspection package rather than under an EU-style battery regulation, which Mozambique does not operate. Second, any cordless tool with a radio function （for example wireless connectivity） requires INCM type approval, because INCM regulates radio equipment in Mozambique.
summary.zh: 对于无绳电动工具，莫桑比克有两点特定要求。其一，锂电池包需要安全证据和安全运输处理，在 INNOQ 符合性和进口检验资料内评估，而非依据欧盟式电池法规（莫桑比克并不实行）。其二，任何具有无线电功能（如无线连接）的无绳工具需要 INCM 型号核准，因为 INCM 在莫桑比克监管无线电设备。
summary.zht: 對於無繩電動工具，莫三比克有兩點特定要求。其一，鋰電池包需要安全證據和安全運輸處理，在 INNOQ 符合性和進口檢驗資料內評估，而非依據歐盟式電池法規（莫三比克並不實行）。其二，任何具有無線電功能（如無線連接）的無繩工具需要 INCM 型號核准，因為 INCM 在莫三比克監管無線電設備。

standards_or_laws: INCM type approval for cordless tools with radio function （Mozambique radio-equipment regulator）
Lithium battery safety and transport evidence assessed within INNOQ conformity and import inspection
Adopted NM/IEC battery and tool safety clauses where cited

summary.en: China tool files often treat the battery pack as an accessory tested with the tool under GB/T 3883, plus separate lithium-battery transport and safety evidence, and may include SRRC-type radio approval domestically. None of these automatically satisfies Mozambique INCM radio approval or the local conformity and import-inspection assessment of the battery system.
summary.zh: 中国工具文件通常将电池包作为随工具按 GB/T 3883 测试的附件，并附单独的锂电池运输和安全证据，国内可能包含 SRRC 式无线电批准。这些都不能自动满足莫桑比克 INCM 无线电批准或当地对电池系统的符合性和进口检验评估。
summary.zht: 中國工具文件通常將電池包作為隨工具按 GB/T 3883 測試的附件，並附單獨的鋰電池運輸和安全證據，國內可能包含 SRRC 式無線電批准。這些都不能自動滿足莫三比克 INCM 無線電批准或當地對電池系統的符合性和進口檢驗評估。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 3883 series （battery pack tested with tool）
China lithium-battery safety and transport evidence
China SRRC-type radio approval where applicable

gap.en: Cordless tools carry two extra Mozambique items beyond the wired-tool baseline. A China SRRC radio approval does not transfer, so any wireless cordless tool needs INCM type approval. And a battery that passed China domestic or transport tests still needs to be presented inside the INNOQ conformity and import-inspection package, not assumed acceptable under an EU battery regulation that does not apply here.
gap.zh: 无绳工具在有线工具基线之外增加两项莫桑比克事项。中国 SRRC 无线电批准不可转用，故任何无线无绳工具需要 INCM 型号核准。通过中国国内或运输测试的电池，仍需纳入 INNOQ 符合性和进口检验资料呈交，而不能假定其在此处不适用的欧盟电池法规下可被接受。
gap.zht: 無繩工具在有線工具基線之外增加兩項莫三比克事項。中國 SRRC 無線電批准不可轉用，故任何無線無繩工具需要 INCM 型號核准。通過中國國內或運輸測試的電池，仍需納入 INNOQ 符合性和進口檢驗資料呈交，而不能假定其在此處不適用的歐盟電池法規下可被接受。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: INCM type approval for any cordless tool with a radio function. Battery safety is mandatory in practice through INNOQ conformity and import inspection; there is no EU-style standalone battery regulation in Mozambique.
mandatory_status.cn: China battery and SRRC radio evidence does not automatically satisfy Mozambique INCM approval or local battery conformity assessment.

source.publisher: INCM - Instituto Nacional das Comunicacoes de Mocambique

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Mozambique-ready for a wireless cordless tool until INCM type approval is obtained for the radio function and the lithium battery is assessed within INNOQ conformity and import inspection. Do not rely on China SRRC approval or an EU battery regulation, neither of which applies here.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于无线无绳工具，在取得无线电功能的 INCM 型号核准且锂电池在 INNOQ 符合性和进口检验内获评估之前，不能视为莫桑比克就绪。不应依赖中国 SRRC 批准或欧盟电池法规，二者在此均不适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於無線無繩工具，在取得無線電功能的 INCM 型號核准且鋰電池在 INNOQ 符合性和進口檢驗內獲評估之前，不能視為莫三比克就緒。不應依賴中國 SRRC 批准或歐盟電池法規，二者在此均不適用。
